input.summary: Wants to be a helicopter pilot

milestones.title: Degree / Formal Education
milestones.description: Enroll in and complete a recognised diploma or degree at a specialised academy or institute relevant to helicopter pilot

resources.title: Egyptian Civil Aviation Academy - Pilot Training Programs
Egyptian Civil Aviation Authority (ECAA)
Arab Academy for Science, Technology & Maritime Transport (AASTMT) - College of Aviation Technology
Cairo University - Faculty of Engineering (Aerospace Engineering Department)
Ain Shams University - Faculty of Engineering (Aeronautical Engineering Department)

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in helicopter flight manoeuvres, navigation and flight planning, and meteorology for helicopter operations — these are the essential building blocks for a helicopter pilot

resources.title: Egyptian Aviation Academy (EAC)
Falcon Aviation Academy
Aviation Theory Courses on Coursera
Pilot Training & Aviation Courses on Udemy
International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) Official Site

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in helicopter systems knowledge, radio communication, and autorotation and emergency procedures, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: Egyptian National Aviation Academy (ENAA)
EgyptAir Training Academy
International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) Official Website
Coursera Search for Aviation Courses
Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) Official Website

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing supervised driving or operating sessions, route planning, and practical navigation exercises — focus on applying helicopter flight manoeuvres, and navigation and flight planning in realistic scenarios

resources.title: EgyptAir Training Academy (for actual flight practice and simulator training)
Aviation Safety Courses on Coursera
Helicopter Flight Tutorials & Demonstrations on YouTube
X-Plane Flight Simulator (for virtual hands-on flight practice)

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio showcasing your best work, completed projects, certifications, and any measurable achievements related to helicopter pilot

resources.title: Career Development and Professional Skills Courses (Coursera)
Resume Writing and Interview Preparation Courses (Udemy)
Aviation Career and Pilot Interview Tips (YouTube Search)
LinkedIn for Professional Networking and Profile Building
EgyptAir Training Academy (Local Career Guidance Potential)

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your helicopter pilot skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: CV and Resume Building Courses on Coursera
Professional Resume and CV Writing Courses on Udemy
American University in Cairo (AUC) Career Center
Build Your Professional Profile on LinkedIn
Resume & CV Design Templates on Canva

milestones.title: Job Application
milestones.description: Apply for helicopter pilot positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews

resources.title: helicopter pilot jobs on Wuzzuf
helicopter pilot jobs on Forasna
helicopter pilot jobs on LinkedIn
helicopter pilot jobs on Bayt.com
helicopter pilot jobs on Indeed Egypt

milestones.title: Foundation & Core Skills
milestones.description:
Enroll in and complete a recognised diploma or degree at a specialised academy or institute relevant to helicopter pilot

Then: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in helicopter flight manoeuvres, navigation and flight planning, and meteorology for helicopter operations — these are the essential building blocks for a helicopter pilot

resources.title: EgyptAir Training Academy
Egyptian Civil Aviation Authority (ECAA)
College of Engineering and Technology - Arab Academy for Science, Technology & Maritime Transport (AASTMT)
Military Technical College (MTC)

milestones.title: Skill Building & Practice
milestones.description:
Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in helicopter systems knowledge, radio communication, and autorotation and emergency procedures, applying them through exercises and case studies

Then: Gain hands-on experience by completing supervised driving or operating sessions, route planning, and practical navigation exercises — focus on applying helicopter flight manoeuvres, and navigation and flight planning in realistic scenarios

resources.title: Aviation Courses on Coursera
Aviation Safety and Operations Courses on Udemy
Egyptian National Aviation Academy (ENAA)
Egyptian Civil Aviation Authority (ECAA)
SkyVector Aeronautical Charts and Flight Planning

milestones.title: Portfolio & Professional Profile
milestones.description:
Build a professional portfolio showcasing your best work, completed projects, certifications, and any measurable achievements related to helicopter pilot

Then: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your helicopter pilot skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: Professional Development Courses on Coursera
Professional Branding and Resume Building on Udemy
LinkedIn Learning for Career Development
American University in Cairo (AUC) Executive Education Programs
Canva for Professional Portfolio Design

milestones.title: Job Application
milestones.description: Apply for helicopter pilot positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews
